name: Bourbon Fudge Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed vanilla wafers and bourbon in a bowl. Mix until the crumbs are moistened.
2. Melt the semi-sweet chocolate chips.
3. Add the sweetened condensed milk to the melted chocolate and stir just to blend.
4. Slowly stir the chocolate mixture into the crumb mixture.
5. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in milk chocolate or chopped walnuts.
7. Allow the fudge balls to stand until they are cool.
Makes about 5 ½ dozen.
